ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest checks in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest checks out */,
  "number_of_nights" INTEGER /* Number of nights the guest will stay */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel where the reservation is made */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who made the reservation */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room assigned to the reservation */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the reservation */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment for the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the hotel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hotel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hotel is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the hotel is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the guest is from */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the guest is from */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the guest */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program membership status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel where the room is located */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the room (e.g., available, occupied, maintenance) */,
  "rate" REAL /* Room rate */,
  "bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed in the room */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of occupants allowed */,
  "smoking_allowed" INTEGER /* Whether smoking is allowed in the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room assigned to the reservation */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest checks in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest checks out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id", "room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation for which the payment is made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the guest */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service usage */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest using the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was used */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the service usage */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the service used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_usage_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_usage_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest providing the feedback */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the guest */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel where the staff member works */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_reservations" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation handled by the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in handling the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id", "reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel offering the promotion */,
  "offer_name" TEXT /* Name of the special offer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_offers_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_offers" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer the guest is eligible for */,
  "eligibility_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest becomes eligible for the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id", "offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who has the preference */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., room type, extra amenities) */,
  "preference_details" TEXT /* Details of the guest's preference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to redeem rewards */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Rewards offered by the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_loyalty" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the guest is a member of */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest joined the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id", "program_id")
)
